basic_details.job_title: IIM Kozhikode Academic Associate Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode (IIM Kozhikode) has released the official Academic Associate Notification 2026 under Advertisement No. C-49/2026-IIMK.HR. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the IIM Kozhikode Academic Associate Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged up to 35 years with a Master of Social Work (MSW) specializing in Community Development from a recognized university and a minimum of 3 years of relevant work experience in community development, field coordination, youth engagement, or academic/community-based project management can apply online on or before

qualification.education_qualification: Master of Social Work (MSW) with a specialization in Community Development from a recognized university. AND Minimum 3 years of relevant work experience, preferably in community development, field coordination, youth engagement, or academic/community based project management.
qualification.details: Master of Social Work (MSW) with a specialization in Community Development from a recognized university. Minimum 3 years of relevant work experience, preferably in community development, field coordination, youth engagement, or academic/community based project management.

salary_details.pay_scale: Rs.27,800/- (including Rs.3500 as financial support for accommodation & Rs.300/- as Telephone Allowance)
salary_details.details: Rs.27,800/- (including Rs.3500 as financial support for accommodation & Rs.300/- as Telephone Allowance)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

How to Apply
content_sections.text: Applications must be submitted online on or before 09-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIM Kozhikode to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIM Kozhikode Academic Associate Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Academic Associate position at IIM Kozhikode?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Academic Associate post at IIM Kozhikode is 09 July 2026. Ensure you complete all formalities before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Academic Associate role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Master of Social Work (MSW) with a specialization in Community Development from a recognized university to be eligible for this position.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any work experience required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 3 years of relevant work experience is required. This experience should preferably be in areas like community development, field coordination, youth engagement, or academic/community-based project management.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Academic Associate position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Academic Associate position is 35 years.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Academic Associate post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs.27,800/- per month, which includes financial support for accommodation and a telephone allowance.

faq.question: Q6. How many vacancies are available for the Academic Associate post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Academic Associate position in this recruitment drive by IIM Kozhikode.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for the Academic Associate recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Academic Associate role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve an online application, followed by screening, and then an interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q9. In which city is the IIM Kozhikode located?
faq.answer: The Indian Institute of Management Kozhikode is located in Kozhikode, Kerala. However, the job posting mentions the city as Kochi.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for the Academic Associate position?
faq.answer: Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website of IIM Kozhikode or via the direct application link provided in the important links section before the last date.
